item.name: Wind-up Kangaroo
item.description:
Always has a spring in its step.

Use item to acquire the wind-up kangaroo minion.
item.tooltip:
I have faith that you'll
bounce back.
   - Hamon Holyfist
item.specialactiondescription:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 60 to all enemies within range while reducing movement speed by 70%.
Duration: 10s
